flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ogden-Weber Technical College rose 50% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 2.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Ogden-Weber Technical College rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 (71.3% → 90.8%).
